policy.move_rule: Do not move top-level scripts directly. Add subfolder implementations only behind stable wrapper shims and update this inventory first.
policy.delete_rule: obsolete-suspect entries require a focused audit commit before deletion.
policy.package_rule: Root scripts are host-side unless category is runtime-package-needed; APK-bundled runtime scripts live under app/src/main/assets/**/scripts.

categories.runtime-package-needed: Needed to stage runtime/APK payloads or otherwise part of packaging flow.
categories.build-developer: Build, setup, fetch, or developer environment helper.
categories.test-verification: Test, smoke, benchmark, contract, or device verification helper.
categories.obsolete-suspect: Unreferenced or weakly referenced candidate; not deleted without audit.

audit.reference_scan: rg found no runtime callers outside script inventory/README/verifier allowlist and the script file itself; pycache-only hits are ignored.
audit.decision: keep as obsolete-suspect for now; do not delete until paired UI self-test and engine-exec-input JSONL device artifacts have fully replaced this ad-hoc repro.

audit.reference_scan: rg found no active caller; current build wrappers use build-native-termux.sh to avoid x86_64 NDK tool invocation on aarch64 hosts.
audit.decision: keep as obsolete-suspect for now; future deletion is acceptable after confirming no supported aarch64-host build path depends on mutating the NDK with box64 shims.
